key_excerpts.text: Symbolica 2.0 发布，这是一款可编程符号系统，支持 Python 和 Rust 语言。该版本在 Hacker News 上获得 100 点热度。
Introduction Symbolica is a high-performance symbolic computation framework for Python and Rust.
You can use it to manipulate symbolic expressions and turn them into fast numerical kernels for computing Jacobians, numerical optimization, integration, and much more.
0 release of Symbolica, with many exciting new features and improvements.
The theme of this release is programmable symbols: more of Symbolica’s behavior can now be customized by the user.
